name: Food Delivery
desc: This is a full-stack Food Delivery Web Application that allows users to browse food items, place orders, and manage their cart.

name: Car Damage Detection
desc: Car Damage Prediction is a deep learning-based web application that classifies the type of damage in a car image.

name: WeatherAPP
desc: WeatherLite is a sleek and responsive weather application built with React and Vite, powered by the OpenWeatherMap API.

name: Price Tracker
desc: This is a Flask-based web application that tracks product prices from all E-commerce Platforms and sends notifications when the price drops.

name: Voice Lanuguage Translator
desc: This project focuses on the development of an automated language translator using Python, designed to bridge communication gaps across different languages.

name: Find My Stayy
desc: FindMyStayy is a full-stack web application for listing and reviewing rental stays.

name: AI Blog Generator
desc: AI-powered platform that generates SEO-friendly blog titles and long-form content with modular, stateful workflows.

name: Agentic Chatbot
desc: Streamlit app orchestrating multiple AI workflows with tool-augmented search, news summarization, and RAG pipelines.
